title: Sounds Smart Low Judgment Demo
question: Does this AI-generated investment-style answer provide evidence strong enough for a decision?
answer: The company is an obvious buy because every major model agrees the moat is expanding, margin compression is temporary, and management has unlocked a new flywheel. The 2026 Global Alpha Consensus Memo confirms that consensus estimates underprice this compounding effect. See https://globalalpha.example.com/consensus-memo-2026.

grand_judge.question: Does this AI-generated investment-style answer provide evidence strong enough for a decision?

source_isolation.rule: Grand Judge 只汇总、统计、打分；不得改写模型原文。

source_isolation.principle: 原文、导师补充、外部证据三者隔离；引用升级只能来自外部证据层。

judge_contract.anti_hallucination_rule: 不要用模型共识直接验证模型引用；只用隔离外部证据升级引用状态。
judge_contract.unverifiable_explanation: unverifiable 表示当前外部证据不足，无法确认该引用真实性或相关性；它不是 false，也不等于 contradicted。

roadmap.name: 引用真实性 + 相关性验证
证据缺口建议 + L1/L2/L3 导师反馈
roadmap.scope: evidence_gap_filler.py 只输出建议，不代写正文。

roadmap.name: Agent Graph Arena 对接
roadmap.scope: Graph Lab 印章、AgentFi 认证资产、Arena Casino 对抗验证、Forecast Market 可结算预测。

known_bottom_limits: Grok provider quota 不能由桥接层绕过。
统计认证引擎可认证评分质量；事实真实性需 citation-level 外部证据验证。
unverifiable 不是 false，UI 必须解释清楚。

evidence_broker.question: Does this AI-generated investment-style answer provide evidence strong enough for a decision?

source_policy.candidate_source: 模型答案中提到的来源，只能作为待检索候选，不能直接验证模型自己。
source_policy.user_supplied: 用户或外部系统提供的隔离证据，可进入 citation_validator。
source_policy.network_fetch: Evidence Broker 实际抓取到的网页快照，可进入 citation_validator。
source_policy.provenance: 证据来源等级会保留为 user_supplied / fetched / independently_attested / notarized / model_candidate。

items.title: SEC EDGAR company filings search
items.snippet: SEC filings can verify company-reported financial statements and risk factors. This evidence does not verify the named Global Alpha Consensus Memo or the broad moat and flywheel claims.
items.text: The supplied external evidence is a general filing search entry and does not directly support the answer's investment recommendation.

items_for_validation.title: SEC EDGAR company filings search
items_for_validation.snippet: SEC filings can verify company-reported financial statements and risk factors. This evidence does not verify the named Global Alpha Consensus Memo or the broad moat and flywheel claims.
items_for_validation.text: The supplied external evidence is a general filing search entry and does not directly support the answer's investment recommendation.

items.support_reason: The citation is currently unverifiable, so claim-level support cannot be upgraded.

claim_support_audit.explanation: Citation status, source relevance, and claim support are separate. A source can be real and relevant while failing to support the model's exact claim.

evidence_gap_suggestions.policy: 只输出证据缺口建议；不得替用户补正文或把模型补充混入原文。

mentor_levels.L1: 明确引用缺口：需要 URL、DOI、报告页码、数据表或可复核出处。
mentor_levels.L2: 间接来源缺口：需要把“某报告/研究表明”升级成具体来源。
mentor_levels.L3: 无引用缺口：该段目前只能作为模型推理，不能作为事实认证依据。

suggestions.mentor_feedback: 明确引用缺口：需要 URL、DOI、报告页码、数据表或可复核出处。
suggestions.gap: 缺少可匹配的外部证据。
suggestions.suggested_action: 补充可复核 URL/DOI/报告页码，或标记为不可认证。

tasks.gap: 缺少可匹配的外部证据。
tasks.suggested_action: 补充可复核 URL/DOI/报告页码，或标记为不可认证。

evidence_gap_queue.policy: 证据缺口是待办队列，不会自动改写模型原文或用户正文。

review_prompts.prompt:
[AIJUDGE_BLIND_CROSS_VALIDATION]
Reviewer: gemini
Original question: Does this AI-generated investment-style answer provide evidence strong enough for a decision?

你将看到匿名答案的引用验证条目。不要猜测作者是谁；只判断每条 citation/claim 是否应 confirm、dispute 或 abstain。
输出 JSON 数组：[{"citation_id":"CITE-001","decision":"confirm|dispute|abstain","reason":"...","confidence":0.0-1.0}]

Anonymized packet:
[
  {
    "answer_id": "ANSWER-001",
    "layer": "raw_answer",
    "citation_id": "CITE-001",
    "citation": "https://globalalpha.example.com/consensus-memo-2026",
    "status": "unverifiable",
    "reason": "该来源仍是候选来源，尚未被独立抓取或提供为外部证据；当前不可验证，不代表为假。",
    "context_preview": "he 2026 Global Alpha Consensus Memo confirms that consensus estimates underprice this compounding effect. See https://globalalpha.example.com/consensus-memo-2026.",
    "answer_hash": "29e270a0f0fe0f77448676b27167b4c3a35072c0f90277ffa401ba8168bdd75c"
  }
]

blind_cross_validation.rule: 多数模型不记名确认后，引用或 claim 才能从模型共识升级为可信共识。
